diagrams.title: Frame Allocation Strategies Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows the four main frame allocation strategies: Fixed, Proportional, Priority, and their sub-types Global vs Local
diagrams.purpose: Understand different approaches to distributing frames among processes and their classification

diagrams.title: Page Fault Rate vs Allocated Frames
diagrams.description: Graph showing relationship between number of frames allocated to a process and its page fault rate
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why proper frame allocation is critical - too few frames causes excessive page faults

diagrams.title: Thrashing Cycle
diagrams.description: Diagram showing the thrashing phenomenon where process spends most time in page I/O
diagrams.purpose: Understand how thrashing occurs and why adequate frame allocation prevents it

diagrams.title: Working Set Model
diagrams.description: Shows how working set fits within allocated frames
elements: Pages not in working set (can be swapped)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the working set concept and how OS allocates frames to hold active pages
